goals: Verify the https://test-api.k6.io endpoint's availability and functional correctness (status 200) with a low error rate under load.
Verify the https://test-api.k6.io endpoint's response time performance meets specified thresholds (e.g., 95th percentile < 500ms) under load.
activities: Make an HTTP GET request to 'https://test-api.k6.io'.
Verify the response: check if the status is 200 and if the response time is less than 500ms.
